name: Eggplant/Swiss Cheese Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the onion and sauté in oil until tender.
2. Add tomato paste, water, oregano, parsley, and salt to a saucepan. Simmer over low heat for 10 minutes.
3. Slice eggplant or zucchini into 1/4-inch-thick pieces.
4. Place one layer of eggplant slices at the bottom of a lightly-oiled 9-by-13 inch baking pan.
5. Pour about 1/3 cup tomato sauce over the eggplant slices.
6. Top with Swiss cheese slices.
7. Add another layer of eggplant slices and pour about 1/2 cup tomato sauce on top.
8. Mix remaining sauce with bread cubes (or parsley) and spoon over the eggplant.
9. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese on top.
10. Bake at 325 degrees for approximately 25 minutes.
Serves: 6
One Serving = Calories: 385 | Carbohydrates: 17 | Protein: 26 | Fat: 26 | Sodium: 497 | Potassium: 471 | Cholesterol: 72
Exchange Value: 3 High-Fat Meat Exchanges + 1 Bread Exchange + 1 Fat Exchange
